service.description: Send a notification message for a Device.

return.message: Device with ID ${deviceId} not found. Notification not sent.

actions.script:
import org.moqui.context.NotificationMessage import org.moqui.impl.context.NotificationMessageImpl
Map msgMap = new HashMap<>() msgMap.put("typeString", notificationType) msgMap.put("device", [deviceId:device.deviceId, deviceName:device.deviceName]) msgMap.put("message", message)
NotificationMessage nm = ec.makeNotificationMessage().topic(notificationTopic).title(notificationTitle?:"") nm.message(msgMap) String currentUserId = ec.user.userId if (currentUserId) nm.userId(currentUserId) nm.type(notificationType) nm.send()

service.description:
Apply a DeviceConfig to a Device.
This service materializes the declared configuration values of a DeviceConfig onto an existing Device. It copies compatible DeviceConfig-level fields to the target Device and updates only existing device-bound Parameter rows that match source configuration parameters by parameterDefId and parameterAlias.
The service does not create ParameterDef rows, does not create missing Parameter(deviceId) rows, and does not write to the real physical device. It updates only Moqui-side Device and Parameter state.
Run a device request group. Mainly used to mark transactions. This is meant to be called as a scheduled service.

log.message: Run device request with name ${request.requestName} in the group ${request.requestGroup}.

return.message: Device request not found. Could not run the device request with name ${requestName}.
The device request does not have a service set. Could not run the device request with name ${requestName}.
The device request does not have a connection set. Could not run the device request with name ${requestName}.
The device request with name ${requestName} has no items to process.

service.description: Run a device request over a fieldbus protocol.
